friday_boost: All evening windows boosted. Late night peak (9PM-Midnight) maximized.
notes: Friday modifier: ALL evening windows boosted. Match at 3PM ET drives Act 3 posts to pre-match (1PM) and during-match Stories only. Post-match spike at ~5:30PM. Reels spaced 3h+ apart. Feed images 2h+ apart.

schedule.title: Quarterfinal Friday Launch Reel — Lady E Whistle
schedule.reasoning: First post sharp at 7AM. Reels peak slot. Friday morning ritual audience. Sets the World Cup tone immediately.

schedule.title: Lady E on Emerald Field — Feed Image
schedule.reasoning: Feed image peak slot. 90-min gap from first post. Morning commute/routine audience.

schedule.title: Golden Boot Jackpot Announcement — Story
schedule.reasoning: Story can post 60-90 min after last story. Early announcement of Golden Boot Jackpot gives the deal all-day visibility.

schedule.title: New Player Bonus — Lady E Welcome — Feed Image
schedule.reasoning: Midday peak (11AM-1PM). New player bonus hits fresh eyes at lunch browse. 2h30 gap from last feed image.

schedule.title: Lucky Lou Welcome Story
schedule.reasoning: Story 2h after last story. Reinforces new player bonus with Lucky Lou personality.

schedule.title: Soccer Ball to Casino Chip Morph — Story
schedule.reasoning: Pre-match hype. 90 min before kickoff. Builds World Cup energy right before match window begins.

schedule.title: Daily Bonus Wheel Spin Reel — Lucky Lou
schedule.reasoning: Reels 3h gap from 7AM reel. Match just starting — Reel captures pre-match energy AND serves during-match algorithm push. Afternoon break audience.

schedule.title: Hat Trick Bonus — 3 Gold Balls — Feed Image
schedule.reasoning: 30 min into match. Hat Trick Bonus announced mid-match. Audience watching and on phones. 3.5h gap from last feed image. Friday afternoon boost active.

schedule.title: Referral Code — Two Golden Boots — Groups Post
schedule.reasoning: Groups post best at 2-3PM. Match kickoff moment — people checking phones. Referral feels natural in group community context.

schedule.title: Golden Dealer 3 Fingers — Hat Trick Story
schedule.reasoning: Story during active match. 90 min gap. Quick, urgent reminder that Hat Trick Bonus ends at 6PM. Won't disrupt viewing.

schedule.title: Daily Bonus Countdown — Lady E Clock — Story
schedule.reasoning: Post-match peak begins. Match ends ~5PM, reaction wave hits 5:30-6:30PM. Daily Bonus urgency reminder catches the post-match audience.

schedule.title: Golden Boot Trophy — Jackpot Still Running — Feed Image
schedule.reasoning: Evening rush begins. Friday 6PM+ is boosted. Golden Boot Jackpot reminder as post-match audience floods feeds. 4h gap from last feed image.

schedule.title: Community Celebration — Summer Crew — Story
schedule.reasoning: Prime Friday evening. Community wins energy peaks 7-9PM on Friday. Story keeps presence active.

schedule.title: Victory Montage Reel — Lucky Lou + Lady E + Dealer
schedule.reasoning: Friday peak Reel slot (7PM slot taken — 8PM is strong Friday). 6h gap from 2PM reel. Maximum evening reach. Post-match energy fully monetized.

schedule.title: Halftime Reload Mystery Drop — Story
schedule.reasoning: Late night peak window opens (9PM-Midnight). Friday late night is boosted. Halftime Reload activates — time-sensitive announcement.

schedule.title: Lucky Lou Big Win — Story
schedule.reasoning: Late night peak. Lucky Lou's daily arc completes. Emotional payoff for the community. 90-min story gap.

schedule.title: Lady E Tomorrow Tease — Reel
schedule.reasoning: Final post of the day. Reel at 11:30PM catches night-owl Friday scrollers. Teases tomorrow. 3.5h gap from 8PM reel. Ends day on mystery and anticipation.
